title: Banana's PVP Modpack
description: A modpack with mods to help you in pvp. Compatible with Fabric 1.21.4
body:
A modpack to help improve your pvp experience.\
\
\
![Totem being popped small with a 3d end crystal in the players hand ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd243b345ad76991aeb19e2224ca7fe974ac25c8.png)
\
\

Features: 

Increased FPS\
Smaller Totem\
Low Fire\
Low Shield\
Totem Counter\
Saturation Bar\
Cleaner F3\
Enhanced Attack Indicator\
Fullbright\
In-Game resource pack browser\
Optimized Anchors and End Crystals\
Shulker Box Tooltips\
Shield Red on Disabled\
TierTagger\
Zoom\
Armour HUD

If you need to contact me or you need help, join my [discord](https://discord.gg/wgWwV6XKbs)!


Uses optimization mods and config files from [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) by [HyperScoop](https://modrinth.com/user/HyperSoop)
